properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v4 v6 v5 v4 v8 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Looking out my front door I see a frantic world desperate for more Quick fix at your fingertips The longer it takes the harder it gets

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: But I'll wait for You To give me everything I need I'm gonna wait for You You make my life complete Yeah, You know You do

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We want it all and we want it now Caught in a high speed chase, can't slow down Headed for a panic attack I gotta get off this one way track

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: So I'll wait for You To give me everything I need I'm gonna wait for You You make my life complete

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I'm gonna wait wait wait for You Cause you're the perfect one for me I'm gonna wait wait wait for You Oh yeah

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I know You see the deepest part of me But still Your love for me is a mystery

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Wait for You to give me everything I need I'm gonna wait wait wait for You Ooh You make my life complete

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: To give me everything I need I'm gonna wait wait wait for You God You make my life complete, yeah I'm gonna wait for You Oh yeah
